checks.description: every motor terminal pair reaches exactly one driver channel
checks.detail: all motors paired to single driver channels

checks.description: power pins reach a rail of legal voltage
checks.detail: all power pins within rated ranges
no supply/ground mixing on any net

checks.description: I2C addresses unique after reassignment plan

checks.detail: all bus devices in the master's voltage domain

checks.description: switch interrupts the main power path (tech-check)
checks.detail: battery positive reaches loads only through a switch

checks.description: failsafe stop chain declared and complete
checks.detail: stop chain complete: CRSF failsafe frames -> kernel commands neutral -> ESC S1/S2 driven to neutral by MCU; ESC self-cuts on signal loss

checks.description: per-rail worst-case draw vs source capability (C-rating, regulator)
checks.detail: every rail's worst-case draw fits its source's rated capacity

checks.description: wire gauge vs worst-case current per segment (ampacity table); connector/fuse ratings
checks.detail: every gauge-declared net and every rated fuse/connector fits its worst-case current

checks.description: brownout topology: MCU rail exposure to motor-stall sag
checks.detail: no MCU shares an unbuffered rail with a motor-driving ESC
